ec2.flowlog.destinationoptions.CfnAbout: Describes the destination options for a flow log.

ec2.flowlog.destinationoptions.FileForma.Description: The format for the flow log. The default is `plain-text`.

ec2.flowlog.destinationoptions.HiveCompa.Description: Indicates whether to use Hive-compatible prefixes for flow logs stored in Amazon S3. The default is `false`.

ec2.flowlog.destinationoptions.PerHourPa.Description: Indicates whether to partition the flow log per hour. This reduces the cost and response time for queries. The default is `false`.
